summary: Tested iteration 36 features: Spanish texts in influencer dashboard and withdrawal notification system. All core features working correctly.

issues: Some UI labels use i18n translations which show in English when browser language is English. This is expected behavior - translations exist in Spanish (es.json) and work correctly when language is switched to Spanish.

passed_tests: API /api/influencer/dashboard returns influencer data with available_balance >= €50
Notification check is idempotent (multiple calls don't fail)
Dashboard and notification endpoints work together in sequence
Toast messages are all in Spanish: 'Error al cargar el dashboard', '¡Código copiado!', etc.
Error messages are in Spanish: 'Error al procesar el retiro', 'Código inválido', etc.
Withdrawal card 'Retirar Comisiones' is visible on dashboard
Email notification includes: monto disponible, explicación del cálculo, botón al dashboard
Notification only sent once per €50 threshold (last_withdrawal_notification_amount tracked)
critical_code_review_comments: The i18n translations are working correctly - Spanish translations exist in /app/frontend/src/locales/es.json
UI shows English when browser language is English, Spanish when switched to Spanish - this is expected i18n behavior
All hardcoded toast messages and error messages are in Spanish
Email notification content is all in Spanish with proper formatting
seed_data_creation: Used existing test influencer with €72.70 available balance (above €50 minimum)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 features verified: 1) All toast/error messages in InfluencerDashboard.js are hardcoded in Spanish. 2) /api/influencer/check-withdrawal-notification endpoint works and sends email when balance >= €50. 3) Email includes monto, explicación del cálculo, and dashboard button. 4) Notification only sent once per €50 threshold via last_withdrawal_notification_amount field. 5) Dashboard calls checkWithdrawalNotification on load.

spanish_toast_messages.details: All toast messages hardcoded in Spanish: 'Error al cargar el dashboard', '¡Código copiado!', 'Error al procesar el retiro', etc.

email_notification_content.details: Email includes: monto disponible (€72.70), explicación del cálculo (15% de 18%), botón 'Ir a mi panel de influencer'

notification_threshold_tracking.details: last_withdrawal_notification_amount field tracks €50 thresholds to prevent duplicate notifications

dashboard_notification_trigger.details: Dashboard calls checkWithdrawalNotification() in useEffect on load

i18n_note: The dashboard uses i18n translations for labels like 'Total Sales', 'Available Balance', etc. These show in English when browser language is English, and in Spanish when switched to Spanish. This is expected behavior - the translations exist in /app/frontend/src/locales/es.json
